message:
feat(sessions): integrate semantic quote matching sidebar into session pages (ukd1.2)

Hypothesis Page (hypothesis/page.tsx):
- Add BrennerQuoteSidebar component for displaying Brenner quotes relevant
  to hypothesis formulation phase
- Define HYPOTHESIS_PHASE_QUOTE_TAGS constant array with phase-relevant tags:
  mechanism, prediction, falsification, measurement, bias-to-experiment,
  anti-planning, confounds, bridging-levels
- Add state management for quote entries (EmbeddingEntry[]), semantic matches
  (Quote[]), and error states
- Add useEffect hook to load embeddings index at mount, filtering for
  quote-source entries only
- Add useMemo hook to construct semantic query from hypothesis fields:
  statement, mechanism, domain, predictionsIfTrue, predictionsIfFalse,
  impossibleIfTrue, plus phase tags
- Add debounced (250ms) semantic search effect using filterQuoteEntriesByTags
  and findSimilarQuotes from quote-matcher module
- Render BrennerQuoteSidebar in right column with responsive layout:
  desktop shows inline, mobile/tablet shows collapsed by default
- Include error display for embedding load or search failures

Operators Page (operators/page.tsx):
- Refactor to use shared quote-matcher module instead of inline helpers
- Remove local parseEmbeddedQuoteText function (now in quote-matcher.ts)
- Remove local titleCaseFromTag function (now in quote-matcher.ts)
- Remove local quoteFromEmbedding function (now embeddingEntryToQuote)
- Replace inline query construction with buildQuoteQueryText helper
- Replace manual tag filtering with filterQuoteEntriesByTags helper
- Replace findSimilar + map with findSimilarQuotes unified helper

This unifies the semantic quote search implementation across session pages,
reducing code duplication and ensuring consistent behavior. Both pages now
leverage the same embedding-based similarity search to surface relevant
Brenner methodology quotes for the user's current workflow phase.

Part of bead brenner_bot-ukd1.2: Semantic quote lookup integration.
